overview_client_raw: Bertram Yachts is an iconic American boatbuilder known for its relentless pursuit of performance, luxury, and craftsmanship. With a heritage that dates back to 1960, Bertram's DNA is rooted in sportfishing, yet its vessels exude comfort, durability, and prestige. Undergoing a modern renaissance, Bertram continues to serve discerning boaters who value stability, seaworthiness, and bold design — all proudly built in Tampa, FL.
overview_polished: Bertram Yachts is an iconic American boatbuilder known for its relentless pursuit of performance, luxury, and craftsmanship. With a heritage dating back to 1960, Bertram's DNA is rooted in sportfishing, yet its vessels exude comfort, durability, and prestige. Undergoing a modern renaissance, Bertram continues to serve discerning boaters who value stability, seaworthiness, and bold design — all proudly built in Tampa, Florida.
look_and_feel: Bold and timeless, balancing rugged performance with refined luxury and prestige.
brand_voice: Confident, heritage-driven, and aspirational, celebrating American craftsmanship and the relentless pursuit of excellence on the water.
audience_type: Upper income boaters and sportfishing enthusiasts who value heritage, seaworthiness, and bold design.
coloring_tone: Rich and bold with deep blues and warm highlights, emphasizing prestige and craftsmanship.
music_notes: Cinematic and timeless compositions with ambient jazz and soft house elements that convey sophistication and enduring quality.

overview_client_raw: Ryan Hughes Design Build is a luxury outdoor living company based in Tampa, Florida. They design and build high-end backyards with custom pools, spas, landscaping, outdoor kitchens, lighting, and entertainment features. Their team handles the full process—from design to construction—creating unique outdoor spaces that blend comfort, style, and technology.
overview_polished: Ryan Hughes Design Build is a luxury outdoor living company based in Tampa, Florida. They design and build high-end backyards with custom pools, spas, landscaping, outdoor kitchens, lighting, and entertainment features. Their team handles the full process—from design to construction—creating unique outdoor spaces that blend comfort, style, and technology.
look_and_feel: Natural but vibrant and enhanced footage. Day to night transitions.
brand_voice: Viral and trendy content but elegant and tasteful
audience_type: Families, million dollar home owners, celebrities, bachelors
music_notes: Day to night transitions. Natural but vibrant and enhanced footage. Viral and trendy content but elegant and tasteful. Creating FOMO with their designs and homes.

overview_client_raw: Solana Outdoor Living is a luxury outdoor furniture store in Tampa that offers high-end, custom outdoor living solutions by appointment only. They sell premium furniture, outdoor kitchens, shade systems, fire features, and greenery walls from top international brands. Their team helps clients design their outdoor spaces with 3D planning, expert advice, and full delivery and setup. Focused on style, quality, and durability, Solana creates outdoor areas that feel like an extension of the home, built to last in Florida's climate.
